Legal information

Legal Notice

1. Website Publisher

The website https://www.accueilformalites.fr is published by:

  • Company name: Accueil Formalités
  • Address: 91 rue du Faubourg Saint-Denis, 75010 Paris
  • Phone: 06 71 66 12 01
  • Email: contact@accueilformalites.fr

2. Publication Director

The publication director is the legal representative of Accueil Formalités.

3. Hosting

Hosting provider details will be added before going live (e.g. OVH, Vercel, Netlify…), in accordance with French Law No. 2004-575 of 21 June 2004 (LCEN).

4. Intellectual Property

All content on this website (texts, images, logo, graphics) is the exclusive property of Accueil Formalités or its partners and is protected by French and international intellectual property laws.

Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication or adaptation of any element of the site is prohibited without the prior written consent of Accueil Formalités.

5. Liability

The information published on this site is for general information purposes only. Accueil Formalités makes every effort to keep the information up to date but cannot be held liable for any errors, omissions or results obtained from misuse of this information.

6. Hyperlinks

The site may contain links to third-party websites. Accueil Formalités has no control over those sites and accepts no responsibility for their content or data practices.

7. Applicable Law

These legal notices are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, French courts shall have sole jurisdiction.

Last updated: June 2026.
